key_drivers: Rising real yields (+15bps to 2.01%) and surging MOVE index (+28% to 108.84) are primary headwinds for equities and gold
US-Iran war driving geopolitical risk; oil inventory surprise build (+6.2M bbls) and Trump halt to strikes creating CL volatility and bearish tilt
BoJ hawkish pivot and ECB hold supporting JPY and EUR vs USD; AUD undermined by China PMI contraction (49.0) and risk-off sentiment (VIX 26-27)

fallbacks_used: 10Y nominal yield (~4.375%) used to confirm real yield direction
FRED March 20 HY OAS data used as most recent available
